name: llm-prompt-purify-extension
description: Browser extension that detects sensitive data in LLM prompts and suggests safe masks

scripts.cypress:run: npx tsx scripts/mock-server.ts & sleep 2 && cypress run; EXIT_CODE=$?; kill %1 2>/dev/null; exit $EXIT_CODE
scripts.docker:test:cypress: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.test.yml up mock-server -d && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.test.yml run --rm e2e-cypress; docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.test.yml down
scripts.docker:test:all: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.test.yml up mock-server -d && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.test.yml run --rm all-tests; docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.test.yml down
scripts.prebuild: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
scripts.package: npm run build && cd chromium-extension && zip -r ../llm-purify-extension.zip app/
